race.name: Manitoba Loppet
race.tagline: A prairie loppet on the Canadian flatlands — community Nordic skiing where the cold is guaranteed but the hills are not.

climate.description: Manitoba prairie winter with extreme cold. Temperatures typically -25°C to -10°C. Very reliable snow, very cold conditions.
challenges: Extreme cold — wind chill below -40°C possible
Flat terrain with no wind protection

course.primary: Flat to gently rolling course through Birds Hill Provincial Park near Winnipeg. Prairie parkland terrain with aspen groves.
features: Reliable deep cold for guaranteed snow

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Extreme cold and flat terrain limit appeal, but reliable snow and community spirit keep it alive.

history.summary: The Manitoba Loppet is a community Nordic ski event in Birds Hill Provincial Park near Winnipeg, organized by the Cross Country Ski Association of Manitoba. It represents prairie skiing at its most fundamental.
notable_facts: One of the few Nordic ski events on the Canadian prairies
Organized by the Cross Country Ski Association of Manitoba
Birds Hill Provincial Park is Winnipeg's primary Nordic venue

youtube_data.search_query: Manitoba Loppet cross country ski race Birds Hill Provincial Park

videos.title: Skijor at Birds Hill HD.dv
videos.description:
A skijor at Birds Hill Park outside of Winnipeg, Manitoba, with my faithful outboard engine, Beowulf. If you have an understimulated dog and live near Winnipeg check us out at www.snowmotion.ca

Skijoring and Kicksledding is allowed on the GUA1 skate ski loop at Birds Hill Park.  There is currently discussion about opening the Tamarack trail as well.

It is important to remember that it is unethical to skijor/kicksled on groomed diagonal classic ski trails.  It damages the trail, annoys the other trail users, and is hard on the dog's feet. It is strictly forbidden at Birds Hill park.

videos.title: My first day of XC skiing at the Chickadee Trail in the Bird Hill Provincial Park in November 2021
videos.description:
After the first heavy snow in November 2021, I did cross-country skiing at the Chickadee Trail in the Birds Hill Provincial Park last Sunday.

In the last year, I started to do cross-country skiing after mid-December. We have enough snow to do skiing earlier due to the first heavy snow this winter.

The park management office has not yet created ski tracks for cross-country skiers, but many people enjoyed winter skiing on the trail.

I hope everyone enjoys this winter.
videos.curation_reason: POV skiing experience at Birds Hill Provincial Park showing early season conditions and trail experience.

videos.title: Skijoring with Diamond Disc Dogs
videos.description: My first time skijoring. Steve from Diamond Disc Dogs took me to Bird's Hill Park Manitoba for an introduction to the sport.

videos.title: Manitoba Loppet 2023 | Whiteshell Cross Country Ski Club
videos.description:
The Whiteshell Cross Country Ski Club hosted the Manitoba Loppet at Pinawa, Manitoba. Fun was had by all! Thank you to the many volunteers and racers that came out.
If you are interested in finding out more about joining the ski club or donating, please visit: https://www.whiteshellskiclub.com/

videos.title: 2009 City of Lakes Loppet Saturday
videos.description: Coverage of the 2009 City of Lakes Loppet from the urban paradise for winter fun, Minneapolis, Minnesota.  Video includes coverage of the Ice-Cycle bike races, the Junior Loppet, the Mini-Loppet, the fast-paced Sprints competition, and the Luminary Loppet.
